title: ficus ribesioides
intro: Ficus ribesioides, also known as the Coastal Fig or Banyan Fig, is a species of fig tree native to Australia and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Ficus ribesioides include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Ficus ribesioides is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, with the leaves or roots being used to make herbal teas or tinctures.
